title: Design a crossword puzzle service
shortDescription: Design a crossword puzzle solving service that can efficiently solve large crossword puzzles at scale, handling multiple puzzle requests simultaneously.

All Questions
Were You Asked This?
Design a crossword puzzle service

Design a crossword puzzle solving service that can efficiently solve large crossword puzzles at scale, handling multiple puzzle requests simultaneously.

Asked at:

OpenAI

Senior

Design a service that solves crossword puzzles. Given a board with word slots (positions, directions, lengths) and a dictionary of ~1 million words, find any valid assignment of words that satisfies all intersection constraints.

The board is medium-sized (~50x50) with ~100 word slots to fill. This is NOT an algorithm optimization problem -- the interviewer wants to see you recognize that single-machine brute force is intractable (search space ~10^300) and design a distributed job scheduling system to parallelize the search.

Mid March, 2026

OpenAI

Comments

Comment
Anonymous
Posting as woaidiyia
B
BoldGrayAnteater993
Premium
• 14天前
• edited 13天前

I don't get why everyone concludes that this cannot be solved on a single machine? If you ask Claude there is clearly an algorithm using some index structures (not even that complicated) that makes this feasible to solve on a single machine in a few seconds and treating this is a distributed compute problem makes the whole thing just unnecessarily complex and almost certainly slower. In real life noone would implement this problem as a distributed solver... If OpenAI expects to solve this as a distributed compute problem they are expecting an overengineered solution that is far from reality.

1

Reply
D
